title: LinkedIn Company Employees Scraper
description: Extract LinkedIn company employees with filters and detailed profile information.

cookie.title: LinkedIn Cookie (li_at)
cookie.description: Your LinkedIn 'li_at' session cookie. To get it: 1) Log into LinkedIn in your browser, 2) Open Developer Tools (F12), 3) Go to Application > Cookies > linkedin.com, 4) Copy the value of the 'li_at' cookie.

companies.title: Company URLs or Names
companies.description: List of LinkedIn company URLs (e.g., https://www.linkedin.com/company/google) or company names. URLs are preferred for accuracy.

profileScraperMode.title: Profile Scraper Mode
profileScraperMode.description:
Choose the level of detail for scraped profiles.
- Short: name, headline, location, current positions
- Full: complete work experience, education, skills, and more
- Full + email search: all Full data plus email discovery
enumTitles: Short — Name, headline, location, current positions ($4/1k)
Full — Complete profile with experience, education, skills ($8/1k)
Full + Email Search — All data + email discovery ($12/1k)

locations.title: Location Filter
locations.description: Filter employees by location (e.g., New York, San Francisco, London). Uses LinkedIn's location autocomplete. Use full names like 'United Kingdom' instead of 'UK'.
locations.sectionDescription: Optional filters to narrow down employee search results.

searchQuery.title: Search Query
searchQuery.description: General search query for fuzzy matching (e.g., 'Founder', 'Marketing Manager', 'John Doe'). Supports LinkedIn search operators.

jobTitles.title: Job Titles (Strict Search)
jobTitles.description: Filter employees by exact job titles (e.g., Software Engineer, Product Manager). Strict matching unlike the general search query.

industryIds.title: Industry IDs
industryIds.description: Filter by LinkedIn industry IDs (numbers only). Example: 4 = Software Development, 43 = Financial Services. See full list: https://github.com/HarvestAPI/linkedin-industry-codes-v2

yearsAtCurrentCompanyIds.title: Years at Current Company
yearsAtCurrentCompanyIds.description: Filter by years at current company. 1 = Less than 1 year, 2 = 1-2 years, 3 = 3-5 years, 4 = 6-10 years, 5 = More than 10 years.

yearsOfExperienceIds.title: Years of Experience
yearsOfExperienceIds.description: Filter by total years of experience. 1 = Less than 1 year, 2 = 1-2 years, 3 = 3-5 years, 4 = 6-10 years, 5 = More than 10 years.

seniorityLevelIds.title: Seniority Level
seniorityLevelIds.description: Filter by seniority level IDs. 100 = In Training, 110 = Entry Level, 120 = Senior, 130 = Strategic, 200 = Entry Level Manager, 210 = Experienced Manager, 220 = Director, 300 = VP, 310 = CXO, 320 = Owner/Partner.

functionIds.title: Function / Department
functionIds.description: Filter by LinkedIn function IDs. 1 = Accounting, 8 = Engineering, 13 = IT, 15 = Marketing, 25 = Sales, etc.

maxItems.title: Maximum Profiles
maxItems.description: Maximum number of profiles to scrape. Set to 0 to scrape all available (up to 2500 per query). LinkedIn limits results to 2500 per search query.

startPage.title: Start Page
startPage.description: Start scraping from this search results page (1-based). Useful for resuming partial scrapes.

companyBatchMode.title: Company Batch Mode
companyBatchMode.description:
How to process multiple companies.
- 'All at once': Single search with all companies (max 10, faster)
- 'One by one': Separate search per company (up to 1000, more accurate)
enumTitles: All at once — Single search, max 10 companies, faster
One by one — Separate search per company, up to 1000, more thorough

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Proxy configuration for accessing LinkedIn. Residential proxies are strongly recommended.
